prompt: Extreme macro photograph of a single large teardrop-shaped dewdrop suspended from a diagonal spider silk strand at sunrise, with the dewdrop acting like a lens and clearly refracting an upside-down green forest and the glowing sun inside it. The spider web crosses the frame diagonally from lower left to upper right, with many tiny bead-like dew droplets along the silk and additional fine web strands forming delicate geometric lines in the foreground and right side. Warm golden sunlight sits softly blurred in the background to the left, creating circular bokeh, subtle lens flare, and a dreamy woodland atmosphere. Use a shallow depth of field with razor-sharp focus on the main dewdrop and nearby dew beads, creamy blurred trees and foliage behind, natural greens and amber highlights, photorealistic detail, 100mm macro lens look, f/2.8 aperture, sunrise backlighting, high dynamic range, realistic optics, no text, no people.
